title: D.R. Horton Completes Tender Offer to Acquire Vidler Water Resources
text: ARLINGTON, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $DHI--D.R. Horton announced the successful completion of the cash tender offer for all of the outstanding shares of common stock of Vidler Water Resources.

title: Home builder stocks suffer unanimous selloff after disappointing new home sales data
text: The home builder sector was suffering a unanimous selloff in morning trading Tuesday, after data showing new home sales surprisingly fell in April, and sharply, amid high prices, rising mortgage rates and low supply. The iShares U.S. Home Construction ETF ITB, -3.76% sank 3.4%, with all 47 equity components losing ground, while the SPDR S&P Homebuilders ETF XHB, -3.67% dove 3.4% with all 35 components falling, to underperform the S&P 500's SPX, -2.09% 2.1% slide.

title: VIDLER WATER INVESTOR ALERT - Kuznicki Law PLLC Investigates Proposed Sale of Vidler Water Resources, Inc. - VWTR
text: CEDARHURST, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kuznicki Law PLLC is investigating the proposed sale of Vidler Water Resources, Inc. (NasdaqGS: VWTR) to D.R. Horton, Inc. (NYSE: DHI). Under the terms of the proposed transaction, shareholders of Vidler will receive only $15.75 in cash for each share of Vidler that they own. If you would like to discuss your legal rights regarding the proposed sale, you may, without obligation or cost to you, contact us toll free at 833-938-0905, via email (dk@kclasslaw.com),
